plugins.cameraPermission: ThaliCloud Partner needs camera access to capture your selfie and KYC documents.
plugins.photosPermission: ThaliCloud Partner needs photo library access so you can upload your KYC documents.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: ThaliCloud Partner uses your location in the background to track your deliveries and match you with nearby orders while you're online.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: ThaliCloud Partner uses your location in the background to track your deliveries and match you with nearby orders while you're online.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: ThaliCloud Partner uses your location to match you with nearby orders while you're online.

plugins.cameraPermission: ThaliCloud Partner needs camera access to scan the pickup QR code shown by the kitchen.
